name: Agatos S.p.A.
summary: Agatos S.p.A. operates as an engineering, procurement, and construction company. The company designs, implements, and delivers turnkey photovoltaic plants from biomass, waste-to-energy, biogas, hydro, and small wind turbines. It engineers and builds plants on a turnkey basis for energy efficiency and the production of renewable energy for clients, including companies and individuals, as well as provides O&M and asset management services to its clients. The company is based in Milan, Italy.
